stemHtml: Which one of the following methods is used by a Microwave Landing System (MLS) to indicate distance from the runway threshold?

options.a: Measurement of the frequency shift between the MLS azimuth and elevation transmissions
options.b: Timing the interval between the reception of sequential secondary radar pulses from the MLS station to the aircraft
options.c: Measurement of range by a precision facility DME frequency paired with the azimuth and elevation channels.
options.d: Timing the interval between the transmission and reception of primary radar pulses from the aircraft to MLS station
